name: Ubiquiti Access Door Hub
title: Ubiquiti Access Door Hub
short_description: The Ubiquiti Access Door Hub (UA-Hub-Door) is an advanced single-door control mechanism designed for secure and seamless entry management.
description: The Ubiquiti Access Door Hub (UA-Hub-Door) is an advanced single-door control mechanism designed for secure and seamless entry management. With the capability to integrate two UniFi Access Readers, the system supports both entry and exit control, ensuring comprehensive monitoring. The device also connects to up to two UniFi Protect cameras or a UniFi Protect Chime for enhanced security and user notifications. Supporting 5 x 10/100/1000 Base-T networking interfaces, this hub enables reliable and fast data transmission for a responsive user experience. PoE++ simplifies installation while maintaining energy efficiency, eliminating the need for additional power sources or complicated wiring setups.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Door Access Control
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Access Door Hub (UA-Hub-Door) is an advanced single-door control mechanism designed for secure and seamless entry management. With the capability to integrate two UniFi Access Readers, the system supports both entry and exit control, ensuring comprehensive monitoring. The device also connects to up to two UniFi Protect cameras or a UniFi Protect Chime for enhanced security and user notifications. Supporting 5 x 10/100/1000 Base-T networking interfaces, this hub enables reliable and fast data transmission for a responsive user experience. PoE++ simplifies installation while maintaining energy efficiency, eliminating the need for additional power sources or complicated wiring setups.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Connectivity Options
detailed_description.text: The UA-Hub-Door features 2 lock terminals (12V and dry) to accommodate diverse locking mechanisms, and 2 AUX terminals to support devices like sirens or automatic door openers. Its 4 additional inputs allow integration of sensors or buttons, enhancing system flexibility for tailored solutions. With these versatile connectivity options, this hub is perfect for residential, commercial, or industrial applications, making secure access both efficient and customizable. Powered via PoE++ (50V DC, 1A), the UA-Hub-Door is easy to install and energy-efficient. The hub supports up to 50W maximum power consumption with PoE output, ensuring stable operation even when multiple peripherals are connected. Minimal cabling requirements (24 AWG or higher) provide flexibility for various installation scenarios.

detailed_description.heading: Simplified Integration
detailed_description.text: Designed for simplicity and compatibility, the UA-Hub-Door streamlines the process of upgrading or expanding access control systems. The Hub integrates seamlessly with the UniFi system, including Access Readers, Protect cameras, and other devices, creating a unified security solution. UL 294 certification reflects its compliance with rigorous safety and performance standards, providing Level I ratings across critical categories: resistance to destructive attacks, secure communication lines, operational endurance, and reliable standby power. The system is ideal for IT professionals seeking to manage access control from a centralized platform while enjoying the scalability and reliability of UniFi technology.
